_doc: THE THALAMUS CANON (CYBORG_BRAIN.md §4) — salience weights, tier thresholds, binding window, refractory, budget coupling. Approval-gated: changing these shapes what the organism ATTENDS to (curriculum-shaping), so edits ride the same human-approval law as the genome. Weights are calibrated so a voiced doubt on a fresh concept, or a confident-wrong rep on a fresh concept, crosses tau1 and wakes Opus — while a Governor flip or a due card alone never does (biometrics weight attention, never drive verdicts). Prosody/emotion/affect are EXCLUDED from scoring by construction (stripped at the door in code, not here).
